name: Chicken Chow Mein
recipeIngredient: 1 can bamboo shoots (5 or 6 oz), optional
1 can water chestnuts (6 or 8 1/2 oz), drained and sliced
chow mein noodles or fluffy rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, water, onions, and celery in the crock pot.
2. Cover and cook on Low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
3. One hour before serving, turn the crock pot to High setting.
4. Remove chicken from the crock pot; bone and cut into bite-sized pieces.
5. Return the chicken to the crock pot.
6. Combine flour or cornstarch with soy sauce in a separate bowl.
7. Stir the mixture into the crock pot, adding bean sprouts, bamboo shoots, water chestnuts, and molasses.
8. Serve over chow mein noodles or hot fluffy rice.
9. Sprinkle toasted slivered almonds on top.
(8-10 servings)
